subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enthralled by the Beauty of the All-Glorious! In the prime of youth and flower of thy early manhood thou hast attained spiritual joy and fragrance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مفتون جمال ذوالجلال در ابتدای جوانی و عنفوان شبابی روح و ریحان یافتی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @mystical themes, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation
